mano_cua.result_summary: 深色主题下所有设置子页面(Profile/Account/Notifications/Display/Appearance)底部出现大块白色/浅色背景区域，暗色主题仅应用到Card组件未覆盖页面body背景，Display页面最明显
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Dark theme only applied to content cards (shadcn Card components), page body/background remains white/light. All settings subpages show stark white/light block below content card, creating jarring contrast with dark-themed cards above.
